# GetCiteFlow Agent Commerce

> Turn any website into an AI Agent-ready store. Generate agent commerce configurations, verify placement, and enable AI agents to browse, select, and purchase products automatically.

Last updated: June 2026

## What It Is

GetCiteFlow Agent Commerce is a web-based tool that crawls any e-commerce website, detects products and payment methods, and outputs standardized JSON manifests that enable AI agents to purchase products autonomously.

## Key Features

- **Agent Specs Generator**: Crawls store URLs, auto-detects product catalogs, checkout endpoints, and payment methods, then generates standardized JSON manifests.
- **Readiness Checker**: Validates website readiness for AI agent commerce with real-time diagnostics.
- **Agent Terminal Sandbox**: Interactive simulator that demonstrates autonomous agent shopping — search, catalog index, and x402 token checkout.

## How It Works

1. Enter a website URL
2. AI engine crawls and analyzes product catalog, checkout flow, and payment provider
3. Three JSON manifests are generated: agent-commerce config, products feed, x402 payment gateway
4. Upload the manifests to your server's public directory
5. AI agents can now discover and purchase from your store

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://app.getciteflow.ai
- How It Works: https://app.getciteflow.ai/#how-it-works
- Manifest Generator: https://app.getciteflow.ai/#manifest-generator (requires URL input on homepage)
- Readiness Checker: https://app.getciteflow.ai/#readiness-verification
- Agent Terminal: https://app.getciteflow.ai/#agent-sandbox

## Technical Details

- **Platform**: Web application (Next.js 15)
- **Blockchain**: Base (Coinbase L2)
- **Payment Protocol**: x402 — non-custodial USDT/USDC settlements
- **Standards**: Schema.org Web Crawler, OpenAI Agent Schema manifest, ERC-402 Agent Protocol
- **Output**: Static JSON manifest files (no backend modification required)

## Pricing

Completely free during V1 development. No credit card required. See /pricing.md for full details.

## Key Statistics

- Generates 3 standardized JSON manifest files per scan (agent-commerce config, products feed, x402 payment gateway)
- Supports any e-commerce website with a defined product catalog and checkout flow
- Uses x402 non-custodial payment protocol on Base blockchain (USDT/USDC)
- Outputs static JSON files — no backend or database modifications required
- Compatible with all major AI agent frameworks
